tails.verification: Back the U1.2 initialized-store refusal callback with the canonical audit chain; assert the unlocked initialized attempt is audited while pre-store/contended attempts remain stderr-only.
Implement U1.2's staged transaction with store id, schema, lifecycle stamp and one atomic authoritative commit; distinguish uncommitted from initialized store.redb during retry.
Stage the first management identity plus finite admin-bundle grant in U1.2's single transaction and activate the init CLI only after the complete backend is assembled.
Generate the control-audience bootstrap credential, stage only its keyed verifier/accessor/expiry, and authenticate the post-commit disclosed credential.
Stage audit genesis in the same U1.2 transaction and implement the initialized-store re-init refusal event.

Wire U6.5's allocated no-follow reserve primitive into live init: provision/reconcile before commit, validate artifacts through U1.2's inspector, and atomically record matching identity/allocation metadata. Exercise real 576 MiB allocation or a production-equivalent capacity-controlled filesystem profile without sparse substitution.

In the assembled owner-socket flow, reuse U1.2's sink validation and disclosure-before-commit ordering with the nonce/digest ACK handshake for control-token and AppRole secret-id issuance; prove lost-response recovery exposes metadata only and leaves the orphan discoverable/revocable by accessor.
Wire redb meta schema/lifecycle/operation-marker reads into StartupSnapshot; run old/new/no-path, marker agreement, pending-anchor and no-write pre-bind cases against real bytes.

Back U1.5's validated clock-repair state machine and CLI with U8.3's full R41 primitive: disclose a replacement emergency control credential, atomically bump the credential epoch and repair the exact old mark, authenticate the replacement, and leave old credentials invalid.

Submit U1.5 application, idle, and clean-shutdown WatermarkCommand values through U6.2's single writer; atomically persist each accepted mark with state and enforce the 100 ms reserved-admission deadline.

Implement U6.3's concrete TransactionFactory over the real redb state and canonical encrypted audit tables behind U6.2's type-state StorageBackend adapter, so the named writer exclusively owns every online redb write transaction and persists overload aggregates atomically.
Back U6.7 audit query/export with U6.1 SnapshotService cursors, enforcing its concurrency, deadline, cancellation, buffered-byte, and no-raw-handle boundaries against real redb MVCC reads.

Replace U10.2's bounded single-transaction logical snapshot adapter with U6.1 SnapshotService cursors in final assembly and prove consistent real-redb MVCC reads release pinned pages on cancellation, expiration, and completion without changing G3 frames or cutoffs.
Commit U6.3's bounded canonical clock-watermark and boot-override events in the same transaction as each accepted high-water update.
Implement flush plus final unsigned shutdown chain-head commit hook and clean/unclean marker assertions.

Persist/hydrate U6.5 RecoveryReserveRecord and CapacityGuard through the real coordinator; reconcile every authenticated record/file/temp transition before data admission; bind online/offline store reserve status/release/recreate to owner peer plus store-maintenance; and execute exact-threshold minimal recovery, release, external cleanup, recreate, and readiness restoration with real allocated blocks.
Map record-key rewrite progress to reencrypting marker and pending-anchor completion policy.
Map metadata re-MAC progress to reencrypting marker and pending-anchor completion policy.
Exercise authenticated restore marker orphan/pre/post-rename states and pending-anchor admission.
Exercise real supported migration/no-path state, atomic activation boundaries and exact completion command.
Exercise real compaction marker orphan/pre/post-rename state and pending-anchor admission.
Wire signals, admission barrier, queued cancellation, begun-transaction drain, deadline/second-signal exits, listener shutdown and key zeroization to the live executor.

Back U9.1's fingerprint commit hook with reauthorization plus atomic audit/expected-fingerprint persistence, bind the authenticated control trigger to the same primitive, exercise crash reconciliation, and record the final axum-server adopt/fallback verdict after drain/barrier tests.

Persist U4.2 AppRole roles, direct tokens, secret-id usage records, request-id receipts, and reasoned revocations from U4.5's lifecycle kernel; hydrate AuthCatalog at serve startup; bind the frozen token/approle CLI to the authenticated owner socket; and adapt login so usage CAS, token verifier insertion, canonical audit append, and reply commit through one real redb coordinator transaction. Exercise issue/authenticate/revoke and orphan list/revoke through the assembled binary.

Assemble U5.1's final KV dispatcher in the real serve path with hydrated U4 grants and U2 encrypted records; adapt its transaction kernel so authorization reload, CAS, encrypted version mutation/read, canonical versioned audit append, commit, and reply all use the live redb coordinator. Prove the pinned fnox preflight plus KV read against that assembly.

In the final security-ordered middleware stack, insert U9.3's verified per-request ClientSource before U4.3 limiting; keep missing forwarded configuration on the shared bucket; and drain U4.3's bounded DropAggregate buffer into canonical encrypted aggregate audit events on the next coordinator commit without raw source, identity, path, or credential labels.

Persist and hydrate U6.8 SigningLineage, prepared transitions, registered transition digests, and descriptor inventory; bind enroll/prepare/register/list to the owner peer, control-audience audit-checkpoint-manage authorization, reserved coordinator lane, canonical audit events, confirmations, descendant proof, and one activation transaction. Exercise the assembled generate/enroll/A-checkpoint/A-to-B/first-B flow without daemon private-key access.

Make every backup manifest publishing reservation create a signer-bound U6.8 inventory row and resolve it only through registered or owner-audited abandoned terminal disposition; bind lineage generation, transition digest, creator audit position, key id, and backup signature domain.

Persist and hydrate U10.2 RecoveryRecipientCatalog and BackupCatalog; bind create/list/show/resume/recipient-set/signature-register/abandon/receipt-register to the owner socket, control credential, concrete capabilities, reserved coordinator lane, final-barrier reload, canonical recovery events, and safe CLI rendering. Exercise create while serving, lost replies, restart recovery, and both active/recovery rehearsals through the assembled binary.

Make every audit export publishing reservation create a signer-bound U6.8 inventory row and resolve it only through registered or owner-audited abandoned terminal disposition; bind lineage generation, transition digest, creator audit position, key id, and audit-export signature domain.

Import and authenticate the retained public signing lineage during restore/rollback-fork handling, refuse pruning/reset or inconsistent signer intervals, and prove historical checkpoints and manifests still verify after normal restore and explicit fork recovery.
